properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: She trembled as she stood there guilty so afraid Worthy of the justice the Pharisee proclaimed Jesus said let someone sinless cast the stone Then He waited in the silence ‘til everyone had gone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: She said He could see the hurt hidden in my heart And He could feel the shame of all my sinful scars Though He could have just condemned me if He chose But the Rock of Ages has no stone to throw

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I made so many choices in the life I call my own I built my house on shifting sand and not the cornerstone Ill be swept away by the floor tides of regret Until the hand of heaven drew me from it’s depths

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Cause He could see the hurt hidden in my heart And He could feel the shame of all my sinful scars Though He could have just condemned me if He chose But the Rock of Ages has no stone to throw

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: His hands are full of mercy, forgiveness, hope and grace Their bleeding free with cleansing to pardon you today.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: 'Cause He could see the hurt hidden in your heart And He could feel the shame of all your sinful scars Though He could have just condemned you if He chose But the Rock of Ages has no stone to throw
